name: node-is-glob
title: node-is-glob
summary: Node module to return true if a string is a glob or extglob
description:
Node module to return true if a string is a glob or extglob
Node module providing a function that returns true if a string contains
a glob or extglob. Extglobs add the expressive power of regular expressions
to globs patterns.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
